description: You are a health IT integration engineer evaluating OpenICE for a hospital EHR integration project. Your goal is to extract DDS data model specifications from the OpenICE source code at /opt/openice/mdpnp/ and create a FHIR resource mapping proposal. Using the source code (specifically Java or IDL files in interop-lab/ defining DDS topics like Numeric, SampleArray, AlarmLimit, InfusionObjective, DeviceIdentity, Patient, DeviceConnectivity, or InfusionStatus) and observations from simulated devices in the running OpenICE Supervisor, document at least 3 distinct DDS data topic types. Write a data dictionary to /home/ga/Desktop/openice_data_dictionary.txt (minimum 500 bytes) including full type names, field names with data types, clinical purposes, and example metric IDs. Additionally, write a FHIR mapping proposal to /home/ga/Desktop/fhir_mapping_proposal.txt (minimum 400 bytes) proposing how the documented OpenICE data types map to HL7 FHIR R4 resources (such as Observation, Device, Patient, MedicationAdministration, or DeviceMetric), including field-level mapping tables and transformation requirements.
